## Review Checklist

### Author

- [ ] Code follows repo style guide and principles
- [ ] No force-unwraps, `try!`, or `as!` on non-guaranteed paths
- [ ] All new public APIs have DocC documentation
- [ ] Tests added or updated; all tests pass
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or sensitive data
- [ ] `docs/todo.md` updated if needed
- [ ] Technical debt tagged with `// TODO(debt):` if not addressed
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff

### Reviewer

- [ ] Code is correct and complete
- [ ] SOLID / KISS / DRY applied
- [ ] Architecture impact assessed
- [ ] Test quality is sufficient
- [ ] Documentation is adequate
- [ ] Security audit passed
